title: Some protesters won't vote without a cease-fire
shortDescription: Protesters have been marching to speak against the Biden Administration and call for a cease-fire in Gaza. Some say they won't vote otherwise.

title: Obamas fire up Dems for Harris at convention | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Plus: Native Americans go missing at alarming rates. Advocates hope a new alert code can help. | Enthusiasm among Latino voters for Kamala Harris.

title: WATCH: Obamas diss Trump, hype Harris at convention
shortDescription: Barack and Michelle Obama delivered powerful speeches riling up the convention crowd by dissing Donald Trump and praising Kamala Harris.

title: UAW's Shawn Fain 'not going to be shy' about going after Trump
shortDescription: UAW President Shawn Fain has become an important ally of Vice President Kamala Harris. He thinks he can deliver union support for her.

title: What did Michelle Obama say about Trump at the DNC?
shortDescription: Former First Lady Michelle Obama laid into former President Donald Trump in her speech at the Democratic National Convention Tuesday night.

title: Who is Stephanie Grisham? Why the ex-Trump insider was at the DNC
shortDescription: Stephanie Grisham, the ex-press secretary of former President Donald Trump, gave a speech at the Democratic convention.

title: Latino voter enthusiasm surges for Harris but gender gap remains
shortDescription:
An estimated 36 million Latinos are eligible to vote this year. Can Kamala Harris 
win them over?

title: LGBTQ voters see hope in Kamala Harris amid attacks from right
shortDescription: Kamala Harris is a longtime ally of LGBTQ Americans. Her presidential campaign gives many "a sense of hope" amid attacks from the right.

title: In DNC highlight, Michelle Obama doles out Trump jabs and a Kamala Harris tribute
shortDescription: At DNC, Michelle Obama warns Dems of upcoming personal attacks against Kamala Harris.

title: Barack and Michelle Obama fire up Dems for Harris: DNC Day 2 takeaways
shortDescription: The Chicago couple demonstrated their belief that Vice President Kamala Harris is uniquely ready to become America's next president.
